fields.title: Complete Effect v4 cleanup across extensions/tau
fields.description: Address unidiomatic Effect usage, remove sync/global escape hatches, replace throwing boundary decoders with typed validation, and push services toward real Effect-owned implementations across extensions/tau.
fields.close_reason: Completed Effect hardening pass: removed import-time prompt I/O, replaced unsafe persistence/sandbox state handling, scoped footer background work, removed process-global legacy bridge state, hardened listed schema boundaries, and tracked remaining adapter-to-service migration in tau-9sx.
